axioms.A1_embedding: E(x)=(m1,m2,m3,m4) where m1=signed ordinal flow, m2=half correlation, m3=signed compressibility, m4=amplitude transition
axioms.A2_transform_operator: Every transform T acts as operator Δ_T(x)=E(T(x))-E(x)
axioms.A3_tau_axis: Dominant transform axis τ exists; replay/stitch align with τ

P2_tau_universality.statement: Replay aligns with τ universally across all domains

P3_replay_projection.statement: Replay is projection onto manifold m2≈m3

P5_tau_analytic.statement: Empirical τ equals analytic τ from replay forcing corr(a,a)=1

theorem.name: Universal Replay τ Theorem
theorem.statement: E(R(x))-E(x) aligns with m2-axis for all signals; τ≈(0,1,0,0); R(R(x))≈R(x); N(x) annihilated.

falsification.F2: Removing m2 does not destroy τ
